/*
updated on 20191220		for source, it is possible, one order_item_cd from same instance could have different order_item_name, 
						so here is to update order_item_name and test_name. 

*/
UPDATE svtr
SET svtr.order_item_name = svoi.order_item_name 
FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result svtr
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT	order_item_cd, order_item_name, dss_lis_instance_id
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT	order_item_cd, order_item_name, dss_lis_instance_id
				, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY order_item_cd, dss_lis_instance_id ORDER BY LEN(order_item_name) DESC) AS oi_rank
		FROM (	SELECT DISTINCT order_item_cd, order_item_name, dss_lis_instance_id	FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result )oi
	)voi 
	WHERE voi.oi_rank = 1 
) svoi
ON svtr.order_item_cd = svoi.order_item_cd AND svtr.dss_lis_instance_id = svoi.dss_lis_instance_id 
GO 

 

 -- no example, just to be safe
UPDATE svtr
SET svtr.test_name = svt.test_name 
FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result svtr
INNER JOIN 
(
 	SELECT	test_cd, test_name, dss_lis_instance_id
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT	test_cd, test_name, dss_lis_instance_id
				, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY test_cd, dss_lis_instance_id ORDER BY LEN(test_name) DESC) AS test_rank
		FROM (	SELECT DISTINCT test_cd, test_name, dss_lis_instance_id	FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result )t
	)vt 
	WHERE vt.test_rank = 1
) svt
ON svtr.test_cd = svt.test_cd AND svtr.dss_lis_instance_id = svt.dss_lis_instance_id 
GO 



/*
the reason is because the source data is from different file types, excel vs text file.

SELECT s_unit_of_measure_cd , s_unit_of_measure_display, COUNT(*)  
FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result 
GROUP BY s_unit_of_measure_cd , s_unit_of_measure_display 
order by s_unit_of_measure_display
*/
UPDATE svtr
SET svtr.s_unit_of_measure_display = CASE	WHEN s_unit_of_measure_cd = 0 THEN '' 
											WHEN s_unit_of_measure_cd = 325 THEN '%' 
											WHEN s_unit_of_measure_cd IN (28694230, 26699558) THEN 'fraction'
											WHEN s_unit_of_measure_cd IN (48757195,395274,24416132) THEN 'IU/ml'
											WHEN s_unit_of_measure_cd IN (3883678,378688) THEN 'x10*9/L' ELSE svtr.s_unit_of_measure_display END 
FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result svtr
GO

INSERT INTO [viha].[viha_patient] 
([patient_id],[mrn],[phn],[name_last],[name_first],[name_middle],[name_first_middle],[birth_date]	--[patient_name]
,[gender],[ethnicity_id],[city],[province],[country],[postal_code]
,[data_source],[exclude_flag],[dss_lis_instance_id],[updt_dt_tm])

SELECT [patient_id],[mrn],[phn],[name_last],[name_first],[name_middle],[name_first_middle],[birth_date]	--[patient_name]
,[gender],[ethnicity_id],[city],[province],[country],[postal_code]
,[data_source],[exclude_flag],[dss_lis_instance_id],[updt_dt_tm]
FROM 
(
	SELECT	person_id AS patient_id 
			, mrn
			, LTRIM(RTRIM(patient_phn)) AS phn
			, LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER(patient_name_last))) AS name_last
			, LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER(patient_name_first))) AS name_first
			, LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER(patient_name_middle))) AS name_middle
			, RTRIM(LTRIM(UPPER(CASE WHEN ISNULL(patient_name_middle,'') = '' THEN patient_name_first ELSE RTRIM(patient_name_first) + ' ' + LTRIM(patient_name_middle) END))) AS name_first_middle
			, ISNULL(CAST(patient_birth_dt_tm AS DATE), '2100-12-31') AS birth_date
			, CASE patient_gender	WHEN 'Female' THEN 'F'							--source patient_gender IN ('Female','Male','Unknown')
									WHEN 'Male' THEN 'M'
									WHEN 'Unknown' THEN 'U'
									ELSE NULL END AS gender
			, NULL AS ethnicity_id
			, UPPER(patient_city) AS city
			, CASE patient_province	WHEN 'British Columbia' THEN 'BC'
									WHEN 'Alberta' THEN	'AB'
									WHEN 'Ontario' THEN	'ON'
									WHEN 'Saskatchewan' THEN 'SK'
									WHEN 'Quebec' THEN	'QC'
									WHEN 'Yukon Territory' THEN	'YT'
									WHEN 'Manitoba' THEN 'MB'
									WHEN 'Nova Scotia' THEN	'NS'
									WHEN 'Newfoundland' THEN 'NL'
									WHEN 'New Brunswick' THEN 'NB'
									WHEN 'Prince Edward Island' THEN 'PE'
									WHEN 'Nunavut' THEN	'NU'
									WHEN 'Newfoundland/Labrador' THEN 'NL'
									WHEN 'NWT' THEN	'NT'
									WHEN 'Northwest Territories' THEN 'NT'
									ELSE UPPER(patient_province) END AS province			--most data are clean, leave US states intact, leave 'ZZBritishColumbia' intact etc.
			, UPPER(patient_country) AS country
			, REPLACE(RTRIM(LTRIM(ISNULL(patient_postal_code, ''))), ' ', '') AS postal_code
			, CASE input_file_instance	WHEN 'legacy' THEN 'VIHA Lab Legacy' ELSE 'VIHA Lab Ihealth' END AS data_source		--hard coded here
			, 0 AS exclude_flag
			, dss_lis_instance_id
			, GETDATE() AS updt_dt_tm
			, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY person_id, input_file_instance ORDER BY collection_dt_tm DESC ) AS row_number
	FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result
) p
WHERE p.row_number = 1; 
GO

UPDATE [viha].[viha_patient] 
SET patient_name = CASE WHEN ISNULL(name_first_middle,'') = '' THEN name_last ELSE name_first_middle + ' ' + name_last END ;

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS [ecms].[vw_stg_patient_viha];
GO
CREATE VIEW [ecms].[vw_stg_patient_viha]
AS 
SELECT	ds.row_id_prefix + CAST(patient_id AS VARCHAR(10)) AS row_id
		, CAST(patient_id	AS VARCHAR(10)) AS patient_row_id
		, LTRIM(RTRIM(phn))	AS phn
		, CAST(mrn AS VARCHAR(10)) AS mrun
		, CAST(name_first_middle AS VARCHAR(50)) AS name_first_middle
		, CAST(name_last AS VARCHAR(50) )	AS name_last
		, birth_date		AS birth_date
		, gender			AS gender
		, NULL				AS patient_status
		, data_source
		, postal_code		AS postal_code
		, 'H'				AS species
		, CAST(name_first_middle AS VARCHAR(50)) AS name_first_middle_clean 
		, CAST(name_last AS VARCHAR(50) )	AS name_last_clean
		, phn	AS phn_clean
        , 1000 AS julian_month
		, CAST(patient_id AS VARCHAR(10)) AS patient_nbr
		, dss_lis_instance_id
FROM [viha].[viha_patient] p
INNER JOIN (SELECT source_system, row_id_prefix, dss_instance_id  FROM [ecms].[patient_data_source] WHERE LEFT(source_system, 8) = 'VIHA Lab') ds 
ON p.dss_lis_instance_id = ds.dss_instance_id

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS lab.tmp_viha_provider;
GO

SELECT	ordering_provider_id, ordering_provider_msp, ordering_provider_cpsid, ordering_provider_name_first, ordering_provider_name_middle, ordering_provider_name_last
		,ordering_provider_hospital,ordering_provider_hospital_display,ordering_provider_hospital_name,ordering_provider_city,ordering_provider_province
		,ordering_provider_country,ordering_provider_postal_code,hospital_code,dss_lis_instance_id
INTO lab.tmp_viha_provider 	
FROM 
(
	SELECT	ordering_provider_id
			, ordering_provider_msp 
			, ordering_provider_cpsid 
			, ordering_provider_name_first 
			, ordering_provider_name_middle 
			, ordering_provider_name_last 
			, ordering_provider_hospital 
			, ordering_provider_hospital_display
			, ordering_provider_hospital_name
			, ordering_provider_city 
			, ordering_provider_province 
			, ordering_provider_country 
			, ordering_provider_postal_code 
			, 'VIHA' AS hospital_code
			, dss_lis_instance_id
			, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ordering_provider_id, input_file_instance ORDER BY collection_dt_tm DESC) AS provider_rank 
	FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result ) t
WHERE provider_rank  = 1;
GO



/* 
STEP 2 
to have all the unique ordering_provider_id in 1,2 and 3
*/

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS lab.tmp_viha_provider_2;
GO

SELECT ordering_provider_id
		, ordering_provider_msp		
		, ordering_provider_cpsid
		, ordering_provider_name_first
		, ordering_provider_name_middle
		, ordering_provider_name_last
		, ordering_provider_city
		, ordering_provider_province
		, ordering_provider_country
		, ordering_provider_postal_code
		, dss_lis_instance_id
INTO lab.tmp_viha_provider_2
FROM 
(
	SELECT ordering_provider_id
			, ordering_provider_msp		
			, ordering_provider_cpsid
			, ordering_provider_name_first
			, ordering_provider_name_middle
			, ordering_provider_name_last
			, ordering_provider_city
			, ordering_provider_province
			, ordering_provider_country
			, ordering_provider_postal_code
			, dss_lis_instance_id
			, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ordering_provider_id, dss_lis_instance_id ORDER BY collection_dt_tm DESC) AS provider_rank
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT	copy_to_provider_1_id  AS ordering_provider_id
				, copy_to_provider_1_msp AS ordering_provider_msp 
				, copy_to_provider_1_cpsid AS ordering_provider_cpsid 
				, copy_to_provider_1_name_first AS ordering_provider_name_first 
				, copy_to_provider_1_name_middle AS ordering_provider_name_middle 
				, copy_to_provider_1_name_last AS ordering_provider_name_last 
				, copy_to_provider_1_city AS ordering_provider_city 
				, copy_to_provider_1_province AS ordering_provider_province 
				, copy_to_provider_1_country AS ordering_provider_country 
				, copy_to_provider_1_postal_code AS ordering_provider_postal_code 
				, dss_lis_instance_id 
				, collection_dt_tm
		FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result
		UNION ALL

INSERT INTO lab.viha_provider
(	[provider_code]
    ,[provider_cd]
    ,[provider_name]
    ,[provider_type]
    ,[street_address_1]
    ,[street_address_2]
    ,[street_address_3]
	,[city]
	,[province]
	,[country]
    ,[full_address]
    ,[postal_code]
    ,[postal_code_original]
    ,[primary_phone_number]
    ,[secondary_phone_number]
    ,[alternate_phone_number]
    ,[fax_number]
    ,[additional_info]
    ,[provider_status]
    ,[physician_unique_code]
    ,[provider_group_cd]
    ,[provider_group_name]
    ,[hospital_code]
    ,[dss_lis_instance_id]
    ,[is_active]
    ,[updt_dt_tm])
SELECT	CAST(ordering_provider_id AS VARCHAR(10)) AS provider_code
		, CAST(ordering_provider_id AS VARCHAR(10)) AS provider_cd
		, UPPER( ordering_provider_name_first + CASE ISNULL(ordering_provider_name_middle,'') WHEN '' THEN ' ' ELSE ' ' + ordering_provider_name_middle + ' ' END + ordering_provider_name_last) AS provider_name
		--, LEFT(UPPER( ISNULL(ordering_provider_name_first,'') + CASE ISNULL(ordering_provider_name_middle,'') WHEN '' THEN ' ' ELSE ' ' + ordering_provider_name_middle + ' ' END + ISNULL(ordering_provider_name_last,'')) ,100) AS left_100_provider_name
		, NULL AS provider_type
		, NULL AS street_address_1 
		, NULL AS street_address_2
		, NULL AS street_address_3
		, RTRIM(LTRIM ( ISNULL(ordering_provider_city, '') )) AS city
		, RTRIM(LTRIM ( ISNULL(ordering_provider_province, '') )) AS province
		, RTRIM(LTRIM ( ISNULL(ordering_provider_country, '') )) AS country
		, RTRIM(LTRIM ( ISNULL(ordering_provider_city, '') 
		  + CASE ISNULL(ordering_provider_province, '') WHEN '' THEN ' ' ELSE ' ' + ordering_provider_province + ' ' END 
		  + CASE ISNULL(ordering_provider_country, '') WHEN '' THEN ' ' ELSE ' ' + ordering_provider_country + ' ' END
		  + ISNULL(ordering_provider_postal_code , ''))) AS full_address
		, REPLACE(RTRIM(LTRIM(ISNULL(ordering_provider_postal_code, ''))), ' ', '') AS postal_code
		, ISNULL(ordering_provider_postal_code, '') AS postal_code_original
		, NULL AS primary_phone_number
		, NULL AS secondary_phone_number
		, NULL AS alternate_phone_number
		, NULL AS fax_number
		, NULL AS additional_info
		, NULL AS provider_status
		, ordering_provider_msp AS physician_unique_code
		, NULL AS provider_group_cd
		, NULL AS provider_group_name
		, 'VIHA' AS hospital_code
		, dss_lis_instance_id
		, 1 AS is_active
		, GETDATE() AS updt_dt_tm
FROM cte_all_provider ;

INSERT INTO lab.viha_result WITH (TABLOCK)
(result_row_id, result_history_row_id, order_item_code, test_code, obs_seq_nbr, obs_result_seq_nbr, result_data_type_code, result_type_display, result_code
,result_numeric, result_description, dss_lis_instance_id)
SELECT  voi.order_item_row_id + '||' + ct.test_code + '||1||' + CAST(tmp.obs_seq_nbr AS VARCHAR(2)) AS result_row_id		--always 1, all results are final results
		, voi.order_item_row_id + '||' + ct.test_code + '||1'  AS result_history_row_id
		, coi.order_item_code 
		, ct.test_code
		, tmp.obs_seq_nbr 
		, 1 AS obs_result_seq_nbr
		, tmp.result_data_type_code 
		, tmp.result_type_display
		, crc.result_code
		, CASE WHEN tmp.result_type_display IN ('Calculation','Numeric') AND ISNUMERIC(tmp.result_description) = 1 THEN tmp.result_description ELSE NULL END AS result_numeric 
		, tmp.result_description 
		, tmp.dss_lis_instance_id 
FROM lab.tmp_viha_test_result_code tmp
INNER JOIN lab.cfg_code_viha_test ct ON tmp.test_cd = ct.viha_test_code AND tmp.dss_lis_instance_id = ct.dss_lis_instance_id
